name: Phantom X Pro Headphones
description: Premium wireless headphones with active noise cancellation, 40-hour battery life, and studio-quality sound.

name: NovaSkin Smartwatch
description: Advanced smartwatch with health monitoring, GPS, and 7-day battery life.

name: ArcLight Mechanical Keyboard
description: Full RGB mechanical keyboard with tactile switches, aluminum frame, and programmable macros.

name: Vortex Gaming Mouse
description: High-precision gaming mouse with 16000 DPI sensor, 7 programmable buttons, and RGB lighting.

name: UltraView 4K Monitor
description: 27-inch 4K IPS display with 144Hz refresh rate, HDR support, and USB-C connectivity.

name: SteelCore Laptop Stand
description: Adjustable aluminum laptop stand with ergonomic design and heat dissipation.

name: Eclipse Wireless Charger
description: 15W fast wireless charging pad compatible with all Qi-enabled devices.

name: Prism USB-C Hub
description: 7-in-1 USB-C hub with 4K HDMI, 100W PD charging, SD card reader, and 3 USB-A ports.
